# PowerOff

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::PowerOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        PowerOff { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
on, off, device, switch

## Categories
connectivity
